---
title: "Cleaning data for occurrence and community databases - Database #1" 
subtitle: 'EpIG volunteership'
format: html
editor: visual
date: today
author: "Kelly Daniela Zuluaga" 

 
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```


# Cargar librerias y revisar información - Costa Rica

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(sf)
library(CoordinateCleaner)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringi)

spp_link <- read.csv("data/Text/1_Raw/text__CR2024.csv")

head(spp_link)
View(spp_link)
str(spp_link)
glimpse(spp_link)
```

# Revisar cada una de las columnas

```{r}
# Inspect unique values of key categorical fields

str(spp_link)

summary(spp_link)

unique(spp_link$basisOfRecord)
#only one unique value:"PreservedSpecimen. No changes required"

unique(spp_link$taxonRank)
#only one unique value. No changes required for now

table(spp_link$taxonRank, useNA = "ifany")

unique(spp_link$lifeForm)
#""Arboles, , , and Hierbas, , ," "Category of: "Sufrútises, Sufrútices"  required changes or revision

table(spp_link$lifeForm, useNA = "ifany") #"Category of: "Sufrúctises, Sufrútices"

unique(spp_link$institutionCode)
#only one unique value. No changes required for now

unique(spp_link$collectionCode)
#only one unique value. No changes required for now

unique(spp_link$datasetID)
#only one unique value. No changes required for now

unique(spp_link$typeStatus)
#only one unique value. No changes required for now

unique(spp_link$associatedReferences)
#only one unique value. No changes required for now

unique(spp_link$recordedBy)
#This need standarization of names. Initials or complete name?

unique(spp_link$recordNumber)
#No changes for now

unique(spp_link$collectionCode)
#only one unique value. No changes required for now

str(spp_link$eventDate)
#No changes required for now

sum(spp_link$eventDate == "", na.rm = TRUE)
#17688 without data

table(nchar(spp_link$eventDate))
#No changes required

summary(spp_link$eventDate)

head(spp_link$eventDate, 20)
```

#Detectar información dañada en las columnas

```{r}
#str(db)


str(spp_link$occurrenceID)
str(spp_link$basisOfRecord)
str(spp_link$typeStatus)
str(spp_link$associatedReferences)
str(spp_link$institutionCode)
str(spp_link$taxonRank)
str(spp_link$collectionCode)
str(spp_link$recordedBy)
str(spp_link$recordNumber)
str(spp_link$identifiedBy)
str(spp_link$lifeForm)
str(spp_link$datasetID)
str(spp_link$matchCodeEpig)
str(spp_link$matchedNameEpig)
str(spp_link$decimalLatitude)
str(spp_link$decimalLongitude)
str(spp_link$eventDate)
str(spp_link$changes)

# Show the structure of every column automatically
lapply(spp_link, str)
```

#Inspeccion de campos de texto en columnas

```{r}
grep("Ã|Â|ƒ|\\n|\\r", spp_link$recordedBy)

grep("Ã|Â|ƒ|\\n|\\r", spp_link$identifiedBy)
#Totally 686 entries with ","

grep("Ã|Â|ƒ|\\n|\\r", spp_link$changes)

grep("Ã|Â|ƒ|\\n|\\r", spp_link$lifeForm)

head(unique(spp_link$recordedBy), 1000)

head(unique(spp_link$identifiedBy), 30)

sort(table(spp_link$lifeForm, useNA = "ifany"), decreasing = TRUE)
#number of registers in lifeForm
#E (45.164 registros), H (9.002) y NV (493); sin embargo, 15.325 registros presentan valores vacíos.
```

#Revision of Taxonomy

```{r}
table(spp_link$taxonRank, useNA = "ifany")
#No changes required for now

spp_link$taxonRank
```

```{r}
#quitar tildes y símbolos especiales

limpiar_texto <- function(texto) {
  texto_limpio <- iconv(texto, to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT")
  return(texto_limpio)
}

spp_link$recordedBy <- limpiar_texto(spp_link$recordedBy)

#entrada por autor
datos_filtrados <- spp_link %>% 
  filter(recordedBy == "Cervantes, E")
summary(datos_filtrados)
print(datos_filtrados)


datos_filtrados$occurrenceID #autor filtrados
```

```{r}
spp_link$recordedBy[spp_link$recordedBy == "COLECTORES, VARIOS"] <- "colectores, varios"

spp_link$recordedBy[spp_link$recordedBy == "COLECTORES, VARIOS"] <- "colectores, varios"

spp_link$recordedBy[spp_link$recordedBy == "Varios, colectores"] <- "varios, colectores"

spp_link$recordedBy[spp_link$recordedBy == "Serie de varios colectores"] <- "varios, colectores"

unique(spp_link$recordedBy[grep("colectores, varios", spp_link$recordedBy)])

#Standardized generic recordedBy values from uppercase to lowercase (COLECTORES, VARIOS → colectores, varios

```


```{r}
#Delete accent recordedBy

spp_link$recordedBy <- iconv(
  spp_link$recordedBy,
  from = "UTF-8",
  to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT"
)

grep("[ÁÉÍÓÚáéíóúÑñ]", spp_link$recordedBy, value = TRUE)

#Delete hyphen

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub("-", " ", spp_link$recordedBy, fixed = TRUE)

grep("-", spp_link$recordedBy, value = TRUE)

#Add hyphen in latin lastnames
spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Chavez Barrantes",
  "Chavez Barrantes",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Alvarez Alcazar",
  "Alvarez-Alcazar",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Arauz Suarez",
  "Arauz-Suarez",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Burt Utley",
  "Burt-Utley",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Quesada Hernandez",
  "Quesada-Hernandez",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Chinchilla Alvarado",
  "Chinchilla-Alvarado",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Chinchilla Alvarado",
  "Chinchilla-Alvarado",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Quesada Hernandez",
  "Quesada-Hernandez",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Morales Quesada",
  "Morales-Quesada",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Estrada Chavarria",
  "Estrada-Chavarria",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Azofeifa Zuniga",
  "Azofeifa-Zuniga",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Beatriz Guterrez",
  "Beatriz-Guterrez",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Blanco Segura",
  "Blanco-Segura",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Callejas Posada",
  "Callejas-Posada",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Cardenas Lopez",
  "Cardenas-Lopez",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Carrasco LLanes",
  "Carrasco-LLanes",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Carrasco LLanes",
  "Carrasco-LLanes",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Hernandez LLanes",
  "Hernandez-LLanes",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Jardin Botanico Lankester",
  "Jardin Botanico Lankester",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Jimenez Vargas",
  "Jimenez-Vargas",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "	Kriebel Haehner",
  "Kriebel-Haehner",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "	Lobo Cabezas",
  "Lobo-Cabezas",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "	Madrigal Ramirez",
  "Madrigal-Ramirez",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Madrigal Solano",
  "Madrigal-Solano",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Martinez Salas",
  "Martinez-Salas",
    spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Masis Chaves", "Masis-Chavez",
     spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Mata Quiros", "Mata-Quiros",
     spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Montiel Franco", "Montiel-Franco",
     spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Murillo rodriguez", "Murillo-Rodriguez",
     spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Oviedo Brenes", "Oviedo-Brenes",
     spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Padilla Gomez", "Padilla-Gomez",
     spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Perez Ferrera", "Perez-Ferrera",
     spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Perez Garcia", "Perez-Garcia",
     spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Quesada Chanto", "Quesada-Chanto",
     spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Quiros Navarro", "Quiros-Navarro",
     spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Ramirez Delgado", "Ramirez-Delgado",
     spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Ramos Ortiz", "Ramos-Ortiz",
     spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Rey Figueroa", "Rey-Figueroa",
     spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub(
  "Rios Castro", "Rios-Castro",
     spp_link$recordedBy,
  fixed = TRUE
)

#probando una automatizacion
hyphenate_surname <- function(x) {

  sapply(x, function(nombre) {

    if (is.na(nombre) || !grepl(",", nombre)) return(nombre)

    partes <- strsplit(nombre, ",")[[1]]

    apellido <- trimws(partes[1])
    nombres  <- trimws(partes[2])

    # Reemplaza los espacios entre las palabras del apellido por guiones
    apellido <- gsub("\\s+", "-", apellido)

    paste(apellido, nombres, sep = ", ")

  }, USE.NAMES = FALSE)
}
spp_link$recordedBy   <- hyphenate_surname(spp_link$recordedBy)
spp_link$identifiedBy <- hyphenate_surname(spp_link$identifiedBy)
head(spp_link$recordedBy, 20)


grep("Werff|Sanchez-|Rodriguez-", spp_link$recordedBy, value = TRUE)

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub("\\(Carlos\\)", "", spp_link$recordedBy)


#Delete (Carlos) and review

grep("\\(Carlos\\)", spp_link$recordedBy, value = TRUE)


View(data.frame(recordedBy = sort(unique(spp_link$recordedBy))))

#Changes in "Serie de varios colectores"

spp_link$recordedBy[spp_link$recordedBy == 
  "Serie de varios colectores, Serie de varios colectores"] <- 
  "serie de varios colectores"

spp_link$recordedBy[spp_link$recordedBy == "serie de varios colectores"]
```


```{r}
grep("Dodge", unique(spp_link$recordedBy), value = TRUE) #Review Dodge, ?"
```

```{r}

#Review identifiedBy column
View(data.frame(recordedBy = sort(unique(spp_link$identifiedBy))))

spp_link$identifiedBy <- iconv(
  spp_link$identifiedBy,
  from = "UTF-8",
  to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT"
)

grep("[ÁÉÍÓÚáéíóúÑñ]", spp_link$identifiedBy, value = TRUE)
grep("[Ññ]", spp_link$identifiedBy, value = TRUE)

spp_link$identifiedBy <- gsub("-", " ", spp_link$identifiedBy, fixed = TRUE)

# Removed hyphens from identifiedBy.
spp_link$identifiedBy <- gsub("-", " ", spp_link$identifiedBy, fixed = TRUE)


spp_link$identifiedBy <- gsub("\\s+", " ", spp_link$identifiedBy)
spp_link$identifiedBy <- trimws(spp_link$identifiedBy)

```


```{r}
View(data.frame(lifeForm = sort(unique(spp_link$lifeForm))))

spp_link$lifeForm <- iconv(
  spp_link$lifeForm,
  from = "UTF-8",
  to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT"
)

spp_link$lifeForm <- gsub(", , ,", "", spp_link$lifeForm, fixed = TRUE)
spp_link$lifeForm <- trimws(spp_link$lifeForm)

#Corrected misspelled lifeForm value from "Sufructises" to "sufrutices"
spp_link$lifeForm[spp_link$lifeForm == "Sufructises"] <- "sufrutices"
table(spp_link$lifeForm[spp_link$lifeForm %in% c("Sufructises", "Sufrutices")])
spp_link$lifeForm[spp_link$lifeForm == "Sufructises"] <- "Sufrutices"
grep("Sufructises", spp_link$lifeForm, value = TRUE)



spp_link$lifeForm <- gsub(
  "Sufructises",
  "sufrutices",
  spp_link$lifeForm,
  fixed = TRUE
)

grep("Sufructises", spp_link$lifeForm, value = TRUE)

spp_link$lifeForm <- gsub(
  "sufrutices",
  "Sufrutices",
  spp_link$lifeForm,
  fixed = TRUE
)

#Fixed "-no definido-" by "no definido"
spp_link$lifeForm <- gsub("-", "", spp_link$lifeForm, fixed = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#extract year from evenDate

spp_link$year <- as.integer(substr(spp_link$eventDate, 1, 4))
head(spp_link[, c("eventDate", "year")], 10)

View(data.frame(year = sort(unique(spp_link$year))))

idx <- which(
  (is.na(spp_link$year) | spp_link$year == "") &
  !is.na(spp_link$eventDate) &
  spp_link$eventDate != ""
)

spp_link$year[idx] <- substr(spp_link$eventDate[idx], 1, 4)
View(data.frame(eventDate = sort(unique(spp_link$eventDate))))

#all evendate are complete. Extract of year not required
```

```{r}
#Bars

library(ggplot2)

ggplot(spp_link, aes(x = year)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(
    title = "Number of occurrences by year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of records"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


#hystogram

ggplot(spp_link, aes(x = year)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 10) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of occurrence years",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Frequency"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

summary(spp_link$year)

table(spp_link$year)


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

spp_link %>%
  filter(!is.na(year)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(
    title = "Number of occurrences by year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of records"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
summary(spp_link$year)
sum(!is.na(spp_link$year))



library(ggplot2)

ggplot(subset(spp_link, !is.na(year)), aes(x = year)) +
  geom_bar()
```


```{r}
#Curated text_CR2024.cvs in 2.Processed folder

library(readr)

write_csv(
  spp_link,
  "data/Text/2.Processed/text__CR2024.csv"
)
```

```{r}
grep("Unknown|No identificado|Equipo|MegaDetector|,$", spp_link$identifiedBy, value = TRUE)

sort(unique(spp_link$identifiedBy))
hyphenate_surname <- function(x) {

  sapply(x, function(nombre) {

    # Mantener NA
    if (is.na(nombre)) return(nombre)

    # Eliminar espacios al inicio y al final
    nombre <- trimws(nombre)

    # Mantener vacíos
    if (nombre == "") return(nombre)

    # Mantener textos sin coma
    if (!grepl(",", nombre, fixed = TRUE)) return(nombre)

    partes <- strsplit(nombre, ",", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]

    # Si hay más o menos de una coma, no modificar
    if (length(partes) != 2) return(nombre)

    apellido <- trimws(partes[1])
    nombres  <- trimws(partes[2])

    # Reemplazar espacios por guiones solo en el apellido
    apellido <- gsub("\\s+", "-", apellido)

    paste(apellido, nombres, sep = ", ")
  }, USE.NAMES = FALSE)
}
```


```{r}
#verificar cuantas columnas tienen espacios vacíos. Quitar "", ' y . de espacios vacíos

sapply(spp_link, function(x) {
  if (is.character(x)) sum(grepl(";", x, fixed = TRUE), na.rm = TRUE) else NA
})

sapply(spp_link, function(x) {
  if (is.character(x)) sum(grepl("\\.", x), na.rm = TRUE) else NA
})

grep("\\.", spp_link$recordedBy, value = TRUE)
grep("\\.", spp_link$identifiedBy, value = TRUE)

spp_link[] <- lapply(spp_link, function(x) {
  if (is.character(x)) {
    x <- gsub('"', "", x, fixed = TRUE)   # elimina "
    x <- gsub("'", "", x, fixed = TRUE)   # elimina '
    x <- gsub(".", "", x, fixed = TRUE)   # elimina .
    x <- trimws(gsub("\\s+", " ", x))
  }
  x
})

spp_link$recordedBy <- gsub("\\.", "", spp_link$recordedBy)
spp_link$identifiedBy <- gsub("\\.", "", spp_link$identifiedBy)
cols <- c("recordedBy", "identifiedBy")

char_cols <- names(spp_link)[sapply(spp_link, is.character)]
char_cols <- setdiff(char_cols, "changes")

for (col in char_cols) {
  spp_link[[col]] <- gsub('"', "", spp_link[[col]], fixed = TRUE)
  spp_link[[col]] <- gsub("'", "", spp_link[[col]], fixed = TRUE)
  spp_link[[col]] <- gsub("\\.", "", spp_link[[col]])
  spp_link[[col]] <- trimws(gsub("\\s+", " ", spp_link[[col]]))
}

sapply(spp_link[char_cols], function(x) {
  sum(grepl("\\.", x), na.rm = TRUE)
})

View(spp_link)
```


```{r}
#Eliminar , de celdas vacías en TODA la base de datos

spp_link[] <- lapply(spp_link, function(x) {
  if (is.character(x)) {
    x[x == ","] <- ""
  }
  x
})

sapply(spp_link, function(x) {
  if (is.character(x)) sum(x == ",", na.rm = TRUE) else NA
})

```

```{r}
#Curacion de lifeForm

spp_link$lifeForm[spp_link$lifeForm == "Arboles, , ,"] <- "Arboles"
spp_link$lifeForm[spp_link$lifeForm == "Arbustos, , ,"] <- "Arbustos"
spp_link$lifeForm[spp_link$lifeForm == "Sufructices, arbustos o arbolitos, terrestres, autotrofos, erectos"] <- "Sufrutices, arbustos o arbolitos, terrestres, autotrofos, erectos"
spp_link$lifeForm <- iconv(
  spp_link$lifeForm,
  from = "UTF-8",
  to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT"
)

spp_link$lifeForm[spp_link$lifeForm ==
  "Sufructises, arboles o arbustos, terrestres, autotrofos, erectos"] <-
  "Sufrutices, arboles o arbustos, terrestres, autotrofos, erectos"

spp_link$lifeForm[spp_link$lifeForm ==
  "Hierbas, terrestres, autotrofas, -no definido-"] <-
  "Hierbas, terrestres, autotrofas, no definido"
sort(unique(spp_link$lifeForm))
```

```{r}
#create column verbatiumlifeForm

spp_link$verbatimLifeForm <- spp_link$lifeForm
spp_link$lifeForm_en <- spp_link$lifeForm

# Crear la columna en inglés
spp_link$lifeFormEnglish <- spp_link$lifeForm

# Traducción de términos
dic_lifeForm <- c(

"" = "",

"Arboles" = "Trees",
"Arboles, terrestres, autotrofos, erectos" = "Trees, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect",

"Arbusto o arbol" = "Shrub or tree",
"Arbusto o arbol, terrestres, autotrofos, erectos" = "Shrub or tree, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect",

"Arbustos" = "Shrubs",
"Arbustos a arboles, terrestres, autotrofos, erectos" = "Shrubs to trees, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect",
"Arbustos a arbolitos, terrestres, autotrofos, erectos" = "Shrubs to small trees, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect",
"Arbustos o arboles, terrestres o epifiticos, autotrofos, erectas" = "Shrubs or trees, terrestrial or epiphytic, autotrophic, erect",
"Arbustos o arboles, terrestres, autotrofas, erectos" = "Shrubs or trees, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect",
"Arbustos o arboles, terrestres, autotrofos, erectos" = "Shrubs or trees, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect",
"Arbustos o arbolitos, epifitico o epilitico, autotrofos, erectos" = "Shrubs or small trees, epiphytic or lithophytic, autotrophic, erect",
"Arbustos o arbolitos, terrestres, autotrofos, erectos" = "Shrubs or small trees, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect",
"Arbustos, arbolitos o arboles, terrestres, autotrofos, erectos" = "Shrubs, small trees or trees, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect",
"Arbustos, hemiparasitos, erectos" = "Shrubs, hemiparasitic, erect",
"Arbustos, terrestres, autotrofos, erectos" = "Shrubs, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect",
"Arbustos, terrestres, autotrofos, escandentes" = "Shrubs, terrestrial, autotrophic, scandent",
"Arbustos, terrestres, autotrofos, tallo erecto palmiforme" = "Shrubs, terrestrial, autotrophic, palm-like erect stem",
"Arbustos, terrestres, autotrofos, tallos colgantes o pendulos" = "Shrubs, terrestrial, autotrophic, hanging or pendulous stems",
"Arbustos, terrestres, autotrofos, tallos erectos a escandentes" = "Shrubs, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect to scandent stems",
"Arbustos, terrestres, autotrofos, tallos erectos a postrados" = "Shrubs, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect to prostrate stems",
"Arbustos, terrestres, autotrofos, tallos o ramas escandentes" = "Shrubs, terrestrial, autotrophic, scandent stems or branches",

"Bejucos" = "Vines",
"Bejucos, terrestres, autotrofos" = "Vines, terrestrial, autotrophic"

)
spp_link$lifeFormEnglish <- unname(dic_lifeForm[spp_link$lifeForm])
sort(unique(spp_link$lifeForm[is.na(spp_link$lifeFormEnglish)]))
spp_link$lifeFormEnglish <- unname(dic_lifeForm[spp_link$lifeForm])
dput(sort(unique(spp_link$lifeForm)))

sum(spp_link$verbatimLifeForm == "Hierbas, , , ", na.rm = TRUE)
idx <- which(spp_link$lifeForm == "Hierbas, , ")

spp_link$lifeForm[idx] <- "Hierbas"

idx <- which(spp_link$verbatimLifeForm == "Hierbas, , ,")

#"Standardized lifeForm: changed 'Hierbas, , ,' to 'Hierbas' and English equivalent 'Herbs'"
spp_link$verbatimLifeForm[idx] <- "Hierbas"
spp_link$lifeFormEnglish[idx] <- "Herbs"



View(spp_link)
```

```{r}
#create dictionary

# Copia de seguridad
spp_link$lifeFormEnglish_old <- spp_link$lifeFormEnglish

# Correcciones generales
spp_link$lifeFormEnglish <- spp_link$lifeFormEnglish |>
  gsub("\\ba\\b", "to", x = _, perl = TRUE) |>
  gsub("\\bo\\b", "or", x = _, perl = TRUE) |>
  gsub("arbustos", "shrubs", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("arboles", "trees", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("arbolitos", "small trees", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("bejucos", "vines", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("tallos", "stems", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("ramas", "branches", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("erecta", "erect", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("erectas", "erect", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("terrestes", "terrestrial", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("epiphytics", "epiphytic", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("epiiftas", "epiphytic", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("facultativas", "facultative", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("flotante", "floating", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("sumergida", "submerged", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("postrados", "prostrate", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("postradas", "prostrate", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("cilindricos", "cylindrical", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE)


spp_link$lifeFormEnglish <- spp_link$lifeFormEnglish |>
  gsub("stems hanging or pendulous",
       "hanging or pendulous stems", x = _) |>
  gsub("stems climbing",
       "climbing stems", x = _) |>
  gsub("stems or branches scandent",
       "scandent stems or branches", x = _) |>
  gsub("stems erect to prostrate",
       "stems erect to prostrate", x = _) |>
  gsub("stems prostrate to scandent",
       "stems prostrate to scandent", x = _) |>
  gsub("floating or submerged",
       "floating or submerged", x = _) |>
  gsub("terrestrial or lithophytic",
       "terrestrial or lithophytic", x = _)

sort(unique(spp_link$lifeFormEnglish))

#Correction
idx <- which(spp_link$lifeFormEnglish == "Herb, terrestrial, autotrofa, erect.")

spp_link$lifeFormEnglish[idx] <- "Herb, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect"

spp_link$lifeFormEnglish <- spp_link$lifeFormEnglish |>
  gsub("autotrofa", "autotrophic", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("autotrofo", "autotrophic", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("autotrofas", "autotrophic", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE) |>
  gsub("autotrofos", "autotrophic", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE)

spp_link$lifeFormEnglish[
  spp_link$lifeFormEnglish ==
    "Herbs sufruticosas arbustivas, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect"
] <- "Subshrub herbs, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect"

spp_link$lifeFormEnglish[
  spp_link$lifeFormEnglish ==
    "Herbs sufruticosas arbustivas, terrestrial, autotrophic, scandent stems or branches"
] <- "Subshrub herbs, terrestrial, autotrophic, scandent stems or branches"

spp_link$lifeFormEnglish[
  spp_link$lifeFormEnglish ==
    "Herbs sufruticosas, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect"
] <- "Subshrub herbs, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect"

spp_link$lifeFormEnglish[
  spp_link$lifeFormEnglish ==
    "Herbs sufruticosas arbustivas, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect"
] <- "Subshrub herbs, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect"

spp_link$lifeFormEnglish[
  spp_link$lifeFormEnglish ==
    "Herbs sufruticosas arbustivas, terrestrial, autotrophic, scandent stems or branches"
] <- "Subshrub herbs, terrestrial, autotrophic, scandent stems or branches"

spp_link$lifeFormEnglish[
  spp_link$lifeFormEnglish ==
    "Herbs sufruticosas, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect"
] <- "Subshrub herbs, terrestrial, autotrophic, erect"

spp_link$lifeFormEnglish <- spp_link$lifeFormEnglish |>
  gsub("Herbs sufruticosas arbustivas", "Subshrub herbs", x = _) |>
  gsub("Herbs sufruticosas", "Subshrub herbs", x = _)

idx <- which(spp_link$lifeFormEnglish == "Shrub or arbol")

spp_link$lifeFormEnglish[idx] <- "Shrub or tree"

spp_link$changes[idx] <- append_change_tag(
  spp_link$changes[idx],
  "Corrected English translation in lifeFormEnglish"
)

spp_link$lifeFormEnglish <- spp_link$lifeFormEnglish |>
  gsub("\\barbol\\b", "tree", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE)

spp_link$lifeFormEnglish <- spp_link$lifeFormEnglish |>
  gsub("\\barboles\\b", "trees", x = _, ignore.case = TRUE)

sort(unique(spp_link$lifeFormEnglish))
```
